Describe the sequence of physical actions performed with the product box.
canonical_answer: At 4s, two hands enter the frame and grip the bottom edges of the rectangular cardboard box; at 10s, the box is held steady displaying the front label with strawberry flavor text; at 16s, the hands rotate the box rapidly causing motion blur before stabilizing again.

question: Describe the visibility of text and branding details as the box is handled.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the box is introduced with red and blue branding visible; at 10s, the front label clearly shows Mrs Freshley's logo and strawberry flavor text; at 12s, the bottom corner displays the count of six bars; at 16s, the package is spun quickly blurring the text momentarily.
